revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tl|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} presents a [[waka (poetry)]] formatted in the standard two-lines, together with its reading (optional), translation (optional), and source (optional). == Usage == {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|line 1|line 2|reading=reading|translation=translation|source=source}} - lines 1 and 2 are required; other parameters optional. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{tl|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} presents a [[waka (poetry)]] formatted in the standard two-lines, together with its reading (optional), translation (optional), and source (optional). == Usage == {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|line 1|line 2|reading=reading|translation=translation|source=source}} - lines 1 and 2 are required; other parameters optional. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{tl|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} presents a [[waka (poetry)]] formatted in the standard two-lines, together with its reading (optional), translation (optional), and source (optional). == Usage == {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|line 1|line 2|reading=reading|translation=translation|source=source}} - lines 1 and 2 are required; other parameters optional. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{tl|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} presents a [[waka (poetry)]] formatted in the standard two-lines, together with its reading (optional), translation (optional), and source (optional). == Usage == {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|line 1|line 2|reading=reading|translation=translation|source=source}} - lines 1 and 2 are required; other parameters optional. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] [[Category:qq]] }}

Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] }}

Code ! Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] }}

Code ! Result |- | style="vertical-align:top;" | {{waka |亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里 |reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ... |translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ... |source = [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575 }} | {{msg:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|亡人のくる夜ときけど君もなし|我が住む宿や魂無きの里|reading = naki hito mo kuru yo to kikedo ...|translation = loosely: They say the dead return tonight, ...|source = [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]] 10:575}} |} == See also == {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Japan arts and culture templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
